description.value:
Used as a replacement for skills rolled with base COOL, EMP, or WILL

Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.
Used as a replacement for skills which rely on base Body or Dex, which are not covered by the Martial skill, and for Evasion.
Used for skills which rely on base INT or TECH.
Increases your BODY stat to 14 (adjusting your HP and Wound Threshold and Death Save)
A cybernetical replacement arm. Comes with a free hand.
Requires cyberarm. The cyberarm this is installed on cannot be broken. (See Black Chrome pgs. 21-22 for more details)
A concealable one-handed Ranged Weapon. Can't hold anything with this hand while activated.
A cybernetical replacement leg. Comes with a free foot.
An artificial eye. Choose Kiroshi Optics!
An artificial eye. Choose Kiroshi Optics!
Must be paired. Provides immunity to dazzling effects (like flashbangs).
Must be paired. Provides immunity to dazzling effects (like flashbangs).
Access to nervous system.
Speedware. +3 to Initiative for 1 min. 1hr cooldown.
Chipware. Removes Seriously Wounded penalties.
Single socket for installation and removal of a piece of chipware.
Plugs in the wrist or head to allow you to connect to machines/systems hands-free.

Generic Excellent Quality Heavy Melee Weapon.

+1 to Attack.

Intended as a direct substitute/improvement to regular armor, to compensate for ablation changes.

-2 to REF, DEX, and MOVE - these penalties do not stack with those for the helmet, and are reduced/improved by 1 for each BODY point the wearer has above 6 (change the armor penalty stat in the item settings tab). Does not ablate while at or above 13 SP unless damage exceeds SP, the blow is from a melee weapon, or AP ammo is used.

Intended as a direct substitute/improvement to regular armor, to compensate for ablation changes.

-2 to REF, DEX, and MOVE - these penalties do not stack with those for the helmet, and are reduced/improved by 1 for each BODY point the wearer has above 6 (change the armor penalty stat in the item settings tab). Does not ablate while at or above 13 SP unless damage exceeds SP, the blow is from a melee weapon, or AP ammo is used.
Experts in combat who use their fighting prowess to dominate in the lawless time of the Red.
Car people, truckers, transportation afficionados, air-pirates, they are the sole carriers of product across the world, maintaining the transport and supply chains in the time of the Red.

Become a bastard.

The bastard cannon is an exotic rocket launcher which has been modified into a shotgun. Instead of shooting normally, when it's fired anyone within 6 square m/yds of the front of the barrel (similar to a shotgun) must make an evasion check, the difficulty of which is set by the user's attack roll. If they successfully evade, they still take half damage from the attack. If the wielder's BODY score is less than 9, they are caught in the blast radius and cannot evade.
Double ablation to armor.
Double ablation to armor.

information.notes:
Bowie is a nomad solo who's been to hell and back over the last 40 years. His cyberware is gritted with badlands dust, and his replacement voicebox has let in the contamination, giving his voice a decidedly metallic rasp.

He rides a heavily modified Hauler, and uses his Bastard Cannon to get shit done. A body's always strung across the radiator - sometimes fresh, sometimes bones - as a warning against interference.

Ability - Wasteland Legend: Bowie has a higher than usual reputation and stats - if he wins a facedown against a mook with lower rep, if the facedown target knows who he is, they'll do everything they can to avoid a fight against him.
